title: Luxury Garden Design & Construction
description: For villas, resorts, and exclusive residences. From concept to completion, we create outdoor spaces that reflect the soul of those who live in them.
alt: Mediterranean garden design by Green Planet Gardening with natural stone pathways, drought-resistant plants and elegant eco-friendly landscaping.
features: Plant selection tailored to Cyprus climate and soil
Hardscaping: stone pathways, terraces, walls, water features
Full project management from concept to completion

title: Professional Maintenance & Green Management
description: Using selected plants, sustainable products, and smart systems. We ensure your garden thrives in every season of the Cyprus climate.
alt: Luxury terrace garden by Green Planet Gardening featuring sculpted greenery, tropical plants and elegant modern outdoor design overlooking the Mediterranean.
features: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly maintenance visits
Pruning, shaping, and plant health management
Irrigation system monitoring and seasonal adjustments
Pest and disease management using sustainable methods

title: Tailored Consulting for Architects & Investors
description: Technical and creative support for high-end projects. We partner with professionals to bring visionary landscapes to life.
alt: Green Planet Gardening consulting with clients, offering luxury garden design expertise and personalised outdoor planning.
features: Plant palette recommendations for Cyprus climate zones
